news.summary: In Dallas, ISN, a worldwide provider of contractor and supplier information management services, has marked a significant achievement by conducting over 2,500 RAVS 360 assessments in the current year. The RAVS 360 assessment program assists contractor clients in recognizing deficiencies in safety practices, workforce education, and health, safety, and environmental (HSE) regulations. It offers concrete steps to enhance safety standards on various work sites. This milestone comes after a decade of pinpointing areas for enhancement in contractor HSE training and protocols through ISN.
news.headline: ISN celebrates milestone: 2,500 RAVS 360 assessments completed, aiding in identifying safety gaps for contractors.

news.summary: Caleres, Inc. (NYSE: CAL) saw its shares decline following the release of its first-quarter FY25 financial results. The company reported a 6.8% decrease in revenues compared to the previous year, totaling $614.2 million, which fell short of the analyst consensus of $622.05 million. Sales at Famous Footwear dropped by 6.3% year over year, with comparable store sales down 4.6%. Brand Portfolio sales also decreased by 6.9% during the quarter. The company's gross margin rate experienced a 150 basis point contraction to 45.4%, and adjusted EBITDA decreased to $28.7 million from $57.4 million in the same quarter last year. The adjusted earnings per share were 22 cents, missing the consensus of 36 cents. Jay Schmidt, the president and CEO of the company...
news.headline: Caleres, Inc. reports Q1 FY25 revenues of $614.2M, a 6.8% decrease YoY, causing stock to plunge after missing analyst consensus.
Ripple USD (RLUSD), a U.S. dollar-pegged stablecoin issued by Ripple, has been officially listed on Bitget's spot trading platform.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Los Angeles, Julieanne O'Connor, a co-founder of Influential Dental known for her impactful contributions to dental leadership and mindset, was acknowledged by New York Weekly as one of the "Top 30 Influential Women Entrepreneurs to Watch Out For in 2025." This recognition highlights O'Connor's significant influence in the entrepreneurial sphere.
news.headline: Julieanne O'Connor, co-founder of Influential Dental, named among New York Weekly's Top 30 Influential Women Entrepreneurs for 2025.

news.summary: The green hydrogen market is experiencing rapid growth, with a value of $2.5 billion in 2024 expected to reach $12 billion by 2034, showing a CAGR of 16.5% from 2025 to 2034. The market is driven by escalating energy demands, climate policies, and technological advancements. Green hydrogen is being adopted in various sectors to decarbonize and replace fossil fuels. The market is segmented by production technology, application, end-user industry, capacity, type, and region. Electrolysis, especially Proton Exchange Membrane (PEM) electrolysis, is the dominant production method. The industrial sector holds the largest market share, with the Asia-Pacific region dominating at 45%. Growth drivers include increasing demand for clean energy, technological improvements, government support, and rising fossil fuel prices. Challenges include high costs and regulatory inconsistencies, while opportunities lie in emerging applications and advanced storage technologies. Key players in the market include Nel ASA, ITM Power, and Plug Power.
news.headline: Green hydrogen market to grow to $12 billion by 2034, with a 16.5% CAGR from $2.5 billion in 2024, driven by clean energy demand and technological advancements. Key market drivers include rising energy costs, climate change awareness, and government policies favoring renewable energy transitions. Production technology, application, end-user industry, capacity, and type are key market segments. Asia-Pacific leads with 45% market share, North America holds 25%, and Europe 20%. Major companies include Nel, ITM Power, Plug Power, Ballard Power Systems, and Siemens Energy. Opportunities lie in residential heating, fuel cell vehicles, advanced storage technologies, and green financing. Challenges include high capital costs, underdeveloped supply chain, pricing competition, and regulatory inconsistencies.

news.summary: The global next-generation batteries market was valued at about $9.2 billion in 2024, and is expected to reach $28.7 billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 12.2% from 2025 to 2034. This growth is driven by rising demand for advanced energy storage solutions, particularly from the electric vehicle and renewable energy sectors. Market segmentation includes product types like Lithium-Sulfur Batteries, Sodium-Ion Batteries, and Solid-State Batteries, among others. Regionally, Asia-Pacific dominates with about 45% market share in 2024, followed by North America and Europe. Growth drivers include the rapid adoption of EVs and clean energy technologies, technological advancements in battery chemistry, increasing government investments, and consumer demand for energy independence. Challenges involve supply chain issues, high costs of emerging technologies, regulatory compliance, and the need for significant R&D investments. Opportunities exist in expanding into emerging battery technologies and the growing energy storage market beyond automotive applications.
news.headline: Global next-generation batteries market valued at $9.2 billion in 2024, projected to reach $28.7 billion by 2034 with 12.2% CAGR growth driven by demand from electric vehicles and renewable energy storage applications.

news.summary: The global Automotive Suspension Shock Absorber Market is expected to grow from USD 31.5 billion in 2024 to USD 45.2 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 4.0%. This growth is driven by increasing consumer demand for comfort, safety, and performance in vehicles, along with technological advancements in adaptive damping systems. The rise in electric vehicle production, aftermarket customization trends, and developments in smart suspension technologies are also contributing to the market expansion. Challenges include rising raw material costs, supply chain disruptions, regulatory pressures on emissions, and price competition. Opportunities lie in the aftermarket customization sector, technological innovations in lightweight composites and magnetorheological systems, rising investment in ADAS and smart vehicle technologies, and the demand for premium shock absorbers in luxury and performance vehicle segments.
news.headline: Automotive suspension shock absorber market to hit $45.2B by 2034, up from $31.5B in 2024, growing at 4.0% CAGR, driven by rising demand for comfort, EV production surge, smart tech advancements.

news.summary: The vehicle-to-grid (V2G) market is set to grow significantly at a CAGR of 30.2% between 2025 and 2033, reaching a valuation of over USD 109.94 billion by 2033 from USD 7.37 billion in 2025. V2G facilitates bi-directional energy exchange between electric vehicles (EVs) and the power grid, leveraging EV batteries for grid support during peak demand. Factors driving market growth include smart grid deployment, EV adoption, and concerns about energy sustainability. Challenges such as infrastructure limitations hinder widespread adoption. Market segments include solution types (hardware, software, services), vehicle types, charging types (bidirectional, smart, unidirectional), applications, end users, and regions. Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicles (PHEVs) dominate the vehicle segment, with bidirectional charging emerging as a growth area. North America leads V2G adoption, followed by Europe and Asia-Pacific. Key players in the market include Nissan, Tesla, Enel X, ABB, BMW, and Honda.
news.headline: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) market expected to reach $109.94 billion by 2033 with a 30.2% CAGR, bolstered by EV adoption and smart grids' development.

news.summary: In San Francisco, ClickHouse, Inc., a prominent company in real-time analytics and AI/ML, unveiled securing $350 million in Series C funding. The funding round was spearheaded by Khosla Ventures and saw contribution from new investors like BOND, IVP, Battery Ventures, and Bessemer Venture Partners, along with existing ones such as Index Ventures, Lightspeed, GIC, Benchmark, Coatue, FirstMark, and Nebius. This latest round builds on previous investments exceeding $300 million.
news.headline: ClickHouse secures $350M in Series C funding from Khosla Ventures, BOND, IVP, Battery Ventures, and others for analytics.

news.summary: The Royal Canadian Mint has released its financial results for Q1 of 2025, detailing its performance amidst global economic uncertainties and trade barriers. Marie Lemay, President and CEO, highlighted the challenges faced, emphasizing efforts to mitigate the impact of U.S. tariffs and market volatility. The Mint's strategic response aims to ensure resilience moving forward. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Royal Canadian Mint announces Q1 2025 financial results amidst economic uncertainties. CEO mentions response to U.S. tariffs.

news.summary: PPG, based in Pittsburgh, has recently announced that its internal tools for measuring product carbon footprints from cradle-to-gate and conducting life cycle assessments have been officially validated according to ISO standards. This validation highlights PPG's commitment to ensuring accurate and standardized measurements regarding sustainability.
news.headline: PPG becomes first U.S.-based coatings company certified for environmental impact measurement tools and processes.

news.summary: The global Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) market was valued at USD 8.69 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow to USD 46.12 billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 18.01%. The market is driven by the increasing demand for real-time data analytics and the rising adoption of OSINT tools by government agencies and private enterprises. The market is dominated by the Media segment, with Big Data software being the leading technology. Government intelligence agencies are the main consumers of OSINT, with cybersecurity being the largest application area. In North America, the OSINT market is led by the United States with key players like Palantir Technologies and Recorded Future. In Europe, the focus is on national security and regulatory compliance, with the UK, Germany, France, and Italy being key countries. The APAC region is the fastest-growing, with China, India, Japan, South Korea, and Australia leading in market share due to rising geopolitical tensions and government digitization. Major players in the OSINT market include Thales Group, BAE Systems, Palantir Technologies, and Recorded Future.
news.headline: Global OSINT market valued at USD 8.69 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 46.12 billion by 2034 with 18.01% CAGR. North America leads in key OSINT market share, with major players like Palantir Technologies, Recorded Future, and Dataminr. APAC region is the fastest-growing market segment due to rising geopolitical tensions and government digitization efforts. Market driven by demand for real-time data analytics and increasing cyber threats. Major applications include cybersecurity and law enforcement.(MediaType and Big Data technologies are dominant segments. Cloud-based deployment mode most prevalent)

news.summary: The global pathology devices market is estimated to reach approximately $27.2 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 6.0% from $15.6 billion in 2024. Factors contributing to this growth include increasing chronic diseases, technological advancements like digital pathology and AI integration, and rising healthcare spending globally. The market is segmented by product type, technology, application, end user, and distribution channel. North America leads with 40% market share, followed by Europe at about 30% and Asia-Pacific as the fastest-growing region with a projected CAGR of 8%. Pathology devices play a crucial role in disease diagnosis and monitoring, with advances in digital pathology and AI improving diagnostic precision. However, challenges include stringent regulatory approval processes, supply chain disruptions, pricing pressures, and barriers to AI adoption. Opportunities in the market include personalized medicine and precision diagnostics, as well as growth in telemedicine and remote diagnostics.
news.headline: Global pathology devices market set to reach $27.2 billion by 2034, growing at a 6.0% CAGR driven by chronic disease prevalence, digital pathology, AI integration, and increased healthcare spending worldwide. North America leads with 40% market share, Europe at 30%, and Asia-Pacific growing fastest at 8%. Major challenges include regulatory approval processes, supply chain disruptions, pricing pressures, and AI adoption barriers. Opportunities lie in personalized medicine and telemedicine growth.

news.summary: The global fumed silica market was valued at USD 1.56 billion in 2024, expected to reach around USD 2.57 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 5.13% from 2025 to 2034. The market is driven by the demand for high-performance parts in the marine & transportation industry. Fumed silica is used in various applications like coatings, adhesives, personal care, pharmaceuticals, food, and more. It is classified into hydrophilic and hydrophobic types. The hydrophilic segment dominates the market. Key application sectors include paints and coatings, adhesives, pharmaceuticals, personal care, food, and gel batteries. The market is segmented by region with Asia Pacific being the largest market, followed by North America, Europe, Latin America, and the Middle East & Africa. The hydrophobic segment is expected to witness the highest growth rate due to its water-repellent properties. The automotive industry's demand for lightweight and efficient coatings is also driving the market growth.
news.headline: Global fumed silica market size was USD 1.56B in 2024, expected to reach USD 2.57B by 2034 with CAGR of 5.13%. Increased demand from marine & transportation industry driving growth. Market offers hydrophilic and hydrophobic fumed silica for various applications like coatings, rubber, pharmaceuticals, and more across industries like automotive, construction, electronics, and healthcare. Market segmented by type, application, end-use industry, and region. Asia Pacific leads market. Insights by Exactitude Consultancy.

news.summary: The latest valuation of Tembo e-LV stands at US$200 million for a majority stake of 51%, marking an increase compared to the prior valuation of US$180 million offered for an 80% share of the unaffiliated VivoPower shares.
news.headline: VivoPower gets new US$200M proposal for 51% of Tembo e-LV, a bump from previous US$180M offer for 80% of shares.

news.summary: Registration for the 2025 Conference and Convention organized by the American Council of the Blind (ACB) in Alexandria, Va., will begin from June 23 and the in-person segment is set to run from July 4 to 11 at the Hyatt Regency Hotel. The event will last for a total of 19 days, marking a significant gathering for members and supporters of the organization.
news.headline: ACB opens registration for 2025 Conference & Convention, happening June 23 to July 11, with in-person part on July 4-11 at Hyatt Regency.

news.summary: In a major development on May 29, 2025, in Hyderabad, India, and Vancouver, BC, Mapmygenome, a top player in genomics and personalized health utilizing AI technology, revealed its acquisition of Microbiome Insights, a renowned global expert in microbial sequencing. The strategic acquisition encompasses all assets associated with Microbiome Insights, establishing Mapmygenome's prominence in the field.
news.headline: Mapmygenome acquires Canada's Microbiome Insights, reinforcing global genomics leadership.

news.summary: Shares of Pure Storage experienced a decline in after-hours trading on Wednesday, despite the company delivering robust financial results for the first quarter. Even though Pure Storage exceeded earnings expectations for Q1, its stock still dropped. The enterprise data storage firm reported impressive figures, with revenue reaching $403 million, representing a year-over-year increase of 12%. This positive performance was overshadowed by the market reaction, leading to a stock downturn.
news.headline: Pure Storage reported a strong fiscal Q1, but stock fell despite beating earnings. Investors react negatively.

news.summary: Novo Nordisk is experiencing a significant decline in market share to Eli Lilly, which is becoming increasingly evident in Novo Nordisk's stock performance. The competition in the weight-loss sector has resulted in Novo Nordisk losing ground to Eli Lilly, reflecting a shift in the industry dynamics. This trend underscores the growing dominance of Eli Lilly in the market, indicating challenges for Novo Nordisk in maintaining its competitive position.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk losing market share to Eli Lilly, impacting stocks. Shows paradigm shift in weight-loss market battle.

news.summary: A recent report "The Railway Telematics Market: 1st Edition" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's available offerings. The report highlights the significant growth expected in the market for real-time tracking solutions for locomotives, multiple units, and rail wagons in the upcoming years. The railway telematics industry is experiencing a positive outlook, driven by the rising awareness of the advantages of remote monitoring solutions among stakeholders within the railway sector. Anticipated substantial growth in this sector is creating a sense of optimism, reflecting the increasing adoption of telematics technologies.
news.headline: Railway telematics market set to grow substantially, report covers 15 OEMs, 29 aftermarket solutions, and 5 hardware providers.

news.summary: A company in Jacksonville, Florida, has recently enhanced their BlindSPOT BAS platform, which focuses on Breach and Attack Simulation. OnDefend has integrated Detection and Response Validation into the platform, providing cybersecurity teams with immediate confirmation that their security controls are operational. This update aims to offer real-time proof of the effectiveness of security measures in place.
news.headline: OnDefend expands BlindSPOT with Detection and Response Validation for real-time security proof.

This move is part of the company's strategic growth plan in response to increasing demand for its M365 services. Cox will be leading the sales team to drive revenue and capitalize on the expanding market opportunities. This appointment signifies an important step for SWOOP Analytics as they aim to strengthen their position in the industry.

news.summary: Renaissance, a renowned global education technology company based in Bloomington, Minnesota, introduced a wide-ranging set of AI literacy lessons via Nearpod on May 29, 2025. These interactive lessons aim to assist teachers in equipping students with the essential knowledge and skills necessary to navigate the potentials and ethical considerations associated with artificial intelligence. Nearpod's platform will serve as a tool to facilitate these lessons, ensuring a dynamic and engaging learning experience for students. This initiative signifies Renaissance's commitment to enhancing education and preparing students (from pre-kindergarten to grade 12) for the evolving landscape shaped by advanced technologies.
news.headline: Renaissance introduces AI literacy resources in Nearpod to aid teachers in preparing students for ethical AI use.

news.summary: Horizon Organic Dairy has welcomed a new executive leader to their team, who brings over 20 years of experience in the food and beverage sector. The individual has a strong passion for premium dairy products. The company, based in Broomfield, Colorado, made this announcement on May 29, 2025. Horizon Organic is renowned as a trailblazer in organic dairy and stands as the largest in its industry.
news.headline: Patricia Stroup named Chief Operating Officer at Horizon Organic Dairy, with over 20 yrs experience. May 29, 2025.

news.summary: A report predicts that the NLP in Healthcare & Life Sciences Market will experience substantial growth, with a projected increase from USD 5.18 billion in 2025 to USD 16.01 billion by 2030. This marks an impressive Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 25.3% during the forecast period.
news.headline: NLP in Healthcare & Life Sciences market to reach $16.01 billion by 2030, growing at 25.3% CAGR from $5.18 billion in 2025.

news.summary: Rosemont, Illinois - On May 29, 2025, the Orthopaedic Research and Education Foundation (OREF) revealed that Ivan Tornos has been appointed as the new Chairman and President. OREF is a prominent private nonprofit entity that supports musculoskeletal (MSK) research in various orthopaedic sub-specialties. This decision marks a significant development in the organization's leadership.
news.headline: Zimmer Biomet CEO Ivan Tornos joins OREF Board of Trustees, leading nonprofit in MSK research funding.
